summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Rakestake Phase 1 features. All 11 backend tests passed. All frontend features verified: 3 real affiliate links (Stake, Shuffle, Rainbet), theme toggle (Main/Dark/Light), casino comparison table, XP-based VIP progression system with 5 levels.
passed_tests: Homepage displays 'Earn Extra Rakeback on Top Crypto Casinos' headline
Theme toggle button cycles through Main → Dark → Light themes correctly
Light theme changes background to light gray/blue
XP Progress Widget shows Silver VIP level with 2,500 XP
XP Progress Widget shows '7,500 XP to Gold' progress
Casino comparison table shows 3 casinos: Stake, Shuffle, Rainbet
Stake affiliate link correct: https://stake.com/?c=rakestakevip
Shuffle affiliate link correct: https://shuffle.com?r=rakestakevip
Rainbet affiliate link correct: https://rainbet.com?r=rakestakevip
Stake shows: Up to $3,000 bonus, 10% rakeback, $20 min deposit, BTC/ETH/LTC/DOGE/XRP
Shuffle shows: Up to $1,500 + 100 Free Spins, 15% rakeback, $25 min deposit, BTC/ETH/SOL/USDT/USDC
Rainbet shows: Up to $1,000 + Daily Rakeback, 12% rakeback, $10 min deposit, BTC/ETH/LTC/USDT/TRX
3 PLAY NOW buttons link to correct affiliate URLs
VIP Progression System shows 5 levels: Bronze (2%), Silver (5%), Gold (8%), Platinum (12%), Diamond (15%)
VIP page displays XP progress bar and current level (Silver)
VIP page shows 'Rakestake VIP CLUB' heading
Partner Casinos section on VIP page shows all 3 casinos with correct links
Weekly VIP Lottery section shows prizes ($1,000, $500, $250)
Footer correctly shows 'Rakestake.com' (not NoToGreed)
Navigation between HOME and VIP CLUB works correctly
critical_code_review_comments: Landing.js correctly implements casino comparison table with all required fields
ThemeContext.js properly implements 3 themes with CSS variables
ThemeToggle.js has data-testid attribute for testing
VIPHub.js correctly displays 5 VIP levels with XP requirements
All affiliate links are correctly configured in backend seed data
Footer.js has been updated to show 'Rakestake.com'
seed_data_creation: None - using existing VIP campaigns from backend with 3 casinos (Stake, Shuffle, Rainbet)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 1 features fully implemented and tested. Homepage has: headline 'Earn Extra Rakeback on Top Crypto Casinos', theme toggle (Main/Dark/Light), XP Progress Widget (Silver VIP, 2,500 XP), casino comparison table with 3 casinos (Stake, Shuffle, Rainbet) showing bonus values, rakeback %, min deposit, and supported cryptos. VIP page has: 5 VIP levels (Bronze 2%, Silver 5%, Gold 8%, Platinum 12%, Diamond 15%), Partner Casinos section, Weekly Lottery section. All affiliate links verified: stake.com/?c=rakestakevip, shuffle.com?r=rakestakevip, rainbet.com?r=rakestakevip. Footer shows 'Rakestake.com'.
